name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: With over 18 years of experience in the London and Surrey property market, Sarah has built a reputation for achieving exceptional results for her clients. She specialises in family homes and period properties, consistently achieving above asking price through her strategic marketing approach and extensive buyer network. Sarah is known for her honest valuations and hands-on approach throughout the entire selling process.
shortBio: 18 years selling premium homes across London and Surrey. Known for honest valuations and above-asking results.

name: James Thompson
bio: James founded Urban Living Estates in 2012 with a mission to bring transparency and innovation to the Manchester property market. His tech-forward approach includes virtual tours, AI-powered pricing, and real-time market updates for clients. Under his leadership, the agency has grown from a single office to five branches across Greater Manchester, selling over 200 properties per year.
shortBio: Innovative Manchester agent. 5 branches, 200+ sales per year. Tech-forward approach with virtual tours.

name: Emma Clarke
bio: Emma is a specialist in rural and village properties across the Cotswolds and surrounding counties. With deep local knowledge spanning 15 years, she understands the unique appeal of countryside living and connects buyers with their dream homes. Her personal touch and attention to detail have earned her a loyal client base and consistently outstanding reviews.
shortBio: Cotswolds specialist with 15 years of countryside property expertise. Outstanding client satisfaction.

name: David Patel
bio: David has been a driving force in Birmingham's property market for over a decade. Specialising in both residential sales and investment properties, he has helped hundreds of families find their perfect home and guided numerous investors through the buy-to-let market. His analytical approach to pricing and marketing ensures properties attract the right buyers quickly.
shortBio: Birmingham's go-to agent for residential and investment properties. Data-driven pricing strategy.

name: Olivia Hughes
bio: Olivia brings a fresh perspective to Bristol's vibrant property market. After training with one of London's top agencies, she returned to her hometown to establish Harbour & Heath, quickly becoming known for her exceptional marketing, stunning property photography, and genuine passion for matching families with the right home. Her modern approach attracts both young professionals and growing families.
shortBio: Bristol's rising star. Exceptional marketing and photography. Fresh, modern approach to selling.

name: Richard Grant
bio: Richard is one of Edinburgh's most respected estate agents, known for his deep understanding of the Scottish property market and its unique legal framework. Specialising in Georgian and Victorian properties across Edinburgh's New Town and Stockbridge, he combines traditional values with modern marketing to achieve exceptional results. His client retention rate is among the highest in Scotland.
shortBio: Edinburgh specialist in period properties. Deep knowledge of Scottish property law and market.

name: Anna Kowalski
bio: Anna has transformed the way properties are sold in Leeds and the wider Yorkshire region. Her background in digital marketing gives her an edge in reaching the right buyers through targeted social media campaigns and search engine optimisation. She has built a team of 12 dedicated agents who share her commitment to exceptional customer service and transparent communication.
shortBio: Leeds digital marketing expert turned estate agent. 12-person team, transparent communication.

name: Thomas Wright
bio: Thomas has made a name for himself in Devon's competitive coastal property market. From beachside cottages in Salcombe to country estates on Dartmoor, his intimate knowledge of the South West's diverse property landscape is unmatched. He is passionate about helping clients navigate the emotional journey of selling a home and prides himself on being available every step of the way.
shortBio: Devon coastal property expert. From Salcombe cottages to Dartmoor estates. Always available.

name: Sophia Chen
bio: Sophia is a powerhouse in London's competitive new-build and development market. With a background in architecture and a network that spans the capital's top developers, she connects buyers with off-plan opportunities and luxury apartments. Her bilingual capabilities and international network make her particularly effective with overseas investors looking to enter the London market.
shortBio: London new-build specialist. Architecture background, international investor network.

name: Michael Brennan
bio: Michael is a trusted name in the Cambridge property market, known for his integrity and no-nonsense approach. He particularly excels with family homes near the city's top schools, understanding the specific needs of relocating families. His honest valuations and refusal to over-promise have earned him one of the highest conversion rates in the region.
shortBio: Cambridge family home specialist. Honest valuations, highest conversion rates in the region.

name: Lucy Ward
bio: Lucy has built Greenfield Estates into one of Brighton's most respected independent agencies. Her team of six specialises in the unique character properties that make Brighton and Hove such a desirable place to live. From Regency townhouses to converted warehouses, Lucy's creative marketing and local knowledge ensure every property reaches its full potential.
shortBio: Brighton character property specialist. Creative marketing for Regency to warehouse conversions.

name: William Fraser
bio: William has been a cornerstone of Newcastle's property community for over two decades. His agency handles everything from student lets to luxury waterfront apartments along the Quayside. Known for his straightforward approach and encyclopedic knowledge of Tyneside, William has guided thousands of homeowners through successful sales with minimal stress.
shortBio: Newcastle veteran with 24 years' experience. Straightforward approach, Tyneside expert.
